GT vs SRH in Ahmedabad (Image: BCCI/IPL)

NEW DELHI: Sunrisers Hyderabad and Gujarat Titans are set for a crucial IPL 2026 clash in Ahmedabad, with both sides aiming to move to the top of the points table and strengthen their playoff chances. SRH briefly occupied the top spot despite winning only one of their first four games, thanks to an impressive run of six wins in their next seven matches. However, RCB replaced them at the summit, leaving Pat Cummins’ side eager to reclaim first place with a win over GT, something they have never achieved before in Ahmedabad.Gujarat Titans, led by Shubman Gill, are also in strong form after a four-match winning streak and sit just below SRH on the table. A victory for GT would also take them to the top, making the encounter vital in the race for playoff qualification and a possible top-two finish.Both teams have relied heavily on their explosive opening partnerships, which have driven their batting success throughout the season. However, the major difference lies in the middle order. GT’s middle-order batters (No. 4-8) have struggled, recording the second-lowest average and the fewest sixes this season.In contrast, SRH’s middle order, powered by Heinrich Klaasen, has been among the most destructive, boasting the third-best strike rate and the highest number of sixes.In bowling, GT’s pace attack has consistently delivered, while SRH have improved significantly since the inclusion of Sakib Hussain. The match could ultimately be decided by whichever bowling unit manages to dismantle the opposition’s top order early and seize momentum in this high-stakes battle.For today's IPL 2026 match at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad, the pitch is expected to be a balanced, batting-friendly surface with a significant dew factor in the second innings. The Ahmedabad track generally offers true bounce and consistent pace, rewarding stroke-makers but also providing assistance to bowlers who hit hard lengths.Ahmedabad is set for an uninterrupted but extremely hot evening. Currently under a heatwave alert. While daytime temperatures have reached a scorching 44°C–45°C, they will only gradually ease to approximately 33°C–34°C by the 7:30 PM IST start time. With a 0% chance of rain, weather will not disrupt play, but the intense heat will test player endurance.Gujarat Titans (Playing XI): Shubman Gill, Sai Sudharsan, Jos Buttler, Washington Sundar, Jason Holder, Rahul Tewatia, Arshad Khan, Rashid Khan, Manav Suthar, Kagiso Rabada, Mohammed SirajImpact Player: Prasidh KrishnaSunrisers Hyderabad (Playing XI): Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan, Heinrich Klaasen, Nitish Reddy, Aniket Verma/Smaran Ravichandran, Salil Arora, Pat Cummins, Harsh Dubey, Shivang Kumar, Sakib HussainImpact Player: Eshan MalingaThe GT vs SRH clash will be held at the Narendra Modi Stadium, Ahmedabad. The game will be broadcast on the Star Sports Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar.The toss for today’s IPL match between Gujarat Titans and Sunrisers Hyderabad will take place at 7:00 PM IST, while the match is scheduled to begin at 7:30 PM IST.
Article Summary: Gujarat titans and sunrisers hyderabad set for crucial ipl 2026 clash. Both sides aiming to move to the top of the points table and strengthen their playoff chances. Match will be held at the narendra modi stadium, ahmedabad. The toss for today's ipl match between gujarat titans and sunrisers hyderabad will take place at 7:00 pm ist.

Article Title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap Race: Heinrich Klaasen leads, Sai Sudharsan closes in

Sunrisers Hyderabad's Heinrich Klaasen (ANI Photo)

The Orange Cap race in IPL 2026 is shaping up into a tight battle, with just a small margin separating the leading run-scorers as the tournament heads into its crucial phase. At the top of the chart is Sunrisers Hyderabad’s Heinrich Klaasen , who has amassed 508 runs in 12 matches at an impressive average of 50.80 and a strike rate of 153.94. His 38 fours and 23 sixes underline his consistency in the middle order and his ability to finish innings strongly under pressure.Just behind him is Gujarat Titans’ Sai Sudharsan, who has continued his rise as one of the most reliable young batters this season. He has scored 501 runs in 12 innings at an average of 41.75 and a strike rate of 155.11, hitting 49 fours and 22 sixes. His ability to anchor innings while maintaining a steady scoring rate has been a key factor in GT’s strong campaign.Sunrisers Hyderabad’s Abhishek Sharma remains the most explosive batter among the top five, scoring 481 runs at an average of 43.73 and a remarkable strike rate of 209.13, including 37 sixes that highlight his power-hitting impact at the top. KL Rahul of Lucknow Super Giants follows closely with 477 runs at an average of 43.36 and a strike rate of 177.99, combining elegance with consistency. Gujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill completes the top five with 467 runs in 11 matches at an average of 42.45 and a strike rate of 158.31.With all five batters in strong form and separated by only a few runs, the Orange Cap race remains wide open heading into the final stretch of IPL 2026.

Article Title: Ipl Qualification Scenario: IPL 2026 Playoff Qualification Scenarios: With 13 matches to go, RCB surge to 99% as KKR crash to 2.6% - odds for each team explained
Article Text:
IPL 2026: RCB vs KKR in Raipur

Watch Krunal Pandya opens up on match-winning knock and RCB’s playoffs push Krunal Pandya opens up on match-winning knock and RCB’s playoffs push

GT have a 99.7% chance of finishing within the top four in terms of points (including possible ties), and their chances of ending up in first or second spot, singly or jointly, are an impressive 82.6%.

With the win on Wednesday, RCB have a 99% chance of finishing among the top four by points and a 77.6% chance of being among the top two.

SRH’s chances of finishing in the top four by points are at 77%, and they have only a 31.4% chance of being among the top two.

PBKS’ chances of ending up among the top four on points are 63.6%, and they have only a 22.2% chance of finishing among the top two.

At 53.2%, CSK have a better-than-even chance of getting into the top four, but only a 19% chance of ending up among the top two.

RR have a slightly lower 53% chance of ending up among the top four and only a 15.3% chance of grabbing one of the top two slots.

KKR’s already slim chances of making the last four have shrunk after Wednesday’s loss to a mere 2.6%, and they can no longer even tie for one of the top two slots.

DC’s hopes of making the playoffs remain at a measly 2.7%. They can, at best, finish third, tied with anywhere between two and three other teams.

Poll Will Chennai Super Kings (CSK) secure a top-four finish? Yes No

How we arrive at the probabilities:

With 13 games remaining in the league stage, LSG and MI are already out of contention for the playoffs. GT and RCB have almost qualified, while SRH would have to do really badly from here on not to make the playoffs. PBKS, too, remain in a good position to get there.CSK and RR have a better-than-even chance of ending up among the top four in terms of points, even if jointly. KKR and DC have really slim chances. There remain 8,192 possible combinations of results, so nothing is certain yet for any of the eight teams remaining in the race.We look at the probabilities:There are 8,192 possible combinations of results remaining with 13 games to go. For each team, we looked at how many of these combinations end with them being among the top four, either singly or tied. We also looked at how many combinations put each team in the top two, either singly or jointly. For instance, DC finish in the top four in just 220 of the possible combinations of match outcomes, translating to a mere 2.7% chance of being among the top four — and even that is jointly, not singly.
Article Summary: Ipl 2026: rcb vs kkr in raipur on wednesday. Rcb have a 99.7% chance of finishing within the top four in terms of points. Csk have a better-than-even chance of getting into the topfour, but only a 19% chance to finish among the top two.

Article Title: ‘It was truly heartbreaking’: Rashid Khan, Mohammad Nabi visit hospitalised Shapoor Zadran in emotional reunion
Article Text:
Rashid Khan, Mohammad Nabi visit hospitalised Shapoor Zadran. (Pic credit: Nabi's X post)

Watch Vinesh Phogat controversy: WFI breaks silence, explains rules Vinesh Phogat controversy: WFI breaks silence, explains rules

Nabi shares heartbreaking update

NEW DELHI: Rashid Khan and Mohammad Nabi paid an emotional visit to former Afghanistan pacer Shapoor Zadran in a hospital in Greater Noida, where the 38-year-old is undergoing treatment for a rare and life-threatening condition.Zadran has been battling Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a severe immune system disorder that can trigger dangerous inflammation and damage multiple organs. He has reportedly been receiving treatment in the Delhi-NCR region for the past few months.After meeting his former teammate on Wednesday, Nabi shared an emotional message on social media, saying it was difficult to see the once-fearless fast bowler in hospital care.“Today in Greater Noida, India, along with Rashid Khan, we met our dear brother Shapoor Jaan. Seeing the same tall, passionate and strong-hearted Shapoor, whom we have always admired fighting bravely on the cricket field, lying on a hospital bed was truly heartbreaking,” Nabi wrote.He also shared photographs from the intensive care unit and prayed for Zadran’s recovery, hoping he would soon return to his family and supporters."May Allah Almighty grant him complete and speedy recovery through His endless mercy and blessings and may he soon return healthy, smiling and reunited with his beloved family, friends and supporters. Ameen," he added.Zadran had initially shown signs of improvement and was discharged from hospital earlier during treatment, but suffered a relapse around 20 days later, according to reports.A left-arm pacer known for his aggressive spells, Zadran represented Afghanistan national cricket team from 2009 to 2020. He played 44 ODIs and 36 T20Is, featuring during the team’s rise on the international stage.
Article Summary: Rashid khan, mohammad nabi visit hospitalised shapoor zadran. The 38-year-old is undergoing treatment for a rare and life-threatening condition. Nabi shared an emotional message on social media, saying it was difficult to see the once-fearless fast bowler in hospital.

Article Title: Edmonton Oilers coaching change rumors grow despite Kris Knoblauch contract extension through NHL 2029 season
Article Text:
Head coach Kris Knoblauch of the Edmonton Oilers (Credit: Getty Image)

Kris Knoblauch future with Edmonton Oilers remains uncertain after Bruce Cassidy interest



The Edmonton Oilers are reportedly exploring coaching options even as Kris Knoblauch is under contract through the 2029 National Hockey League season. The latest NHL trade rumors and NHL news roundup conversations ramped up when reports came out that the organization had asked for permission to speak with former Vegas Golden Knights head coach Bruce Cassidy.The Vegas Golden Knights denied the reported request, as Bruce Cassidy is still under contract with the team. The situation has created new uncertainty around the future of Kris Knoblauch while adding more pressure during the Connor McDavid era in Edmonton.Kris Knoblauch’s future with the Edmonton Oilers remains in question as the organization reportedly reached out to Bruce Cassidy about its head coaching vacancy.The Oilers asked the Vegas Golden Knights for permission to speak with Cassidy after he was recently fired, according to multiple NHL insiders. But Vegas denied the request, since Cassidy is still under contract with the organization even though he is no longer coaching the team.The development has sparked big NHL coaching rumors in Edmonton. Kris Knoblauch signed a contract extension through 2029 earlier this season, but recent reports suggest management could still be open to another coaching change if the franchise feels a veteran coach can better maximize Connor McDavid and Leon Draisaitl in their Stanley Cup window.Bruce Cassidy remains one of the NHL’s most respected coaches after guiding the Vegas Golden Knights to the Stanley Cup championship in 2023. His defensive structure, playoff experience and leadership style reportedly caught the attention of Edmonton during its offseason evaluations.The Oilers have already gone through a number of coaching changes during Connor McDavid’s tenure with the franchise. The superstar captain has seen Todd McLellan, Ken Hitchcock, Dave Tippett, Jay Woodcroft and Kris Knoblauch all hold the role at different points in his career.The latest NHL updates suggest Edmonton management is looking hard at whether another change behind the bench could help the team finally get a championship. There has yet to be an official announcement, but the failed attempt to interview Bruce Cassidy has ramped up the speculation surrounding the organization’s offseason direction tremendously.
Article Summary: The edmonton oilers are reportedly exploring coaching options. Kris knoblauch is under contract through the 2029 national hockey league season. The organization reportedly asked for permission to speak with former vegas golden knights head coach bruce cassidy. Vegas denied the request, as cassidy is still under contract with the team.

Article Title: Ben Shelton and Trinity Rodman Combined Net Worth: Inside tennis star and US soccer team forward's earnings, endorsements income and rising wealth
Article Text:
Ben Shelton and Trinity Rodman (via Trinity Rodman / Instagram)

Ben Shelton and Trinity Rodman’s combined earnings and growing wealth

American tennis star Ben Shelton and U.S. soccer forward Trinity Rodman have become one of the most talked-about young sports couples in recent years. Both athletes are enjoying rapid success in their respective sports while building impressive fortunes at a young age. Shelton has become one of the rising faces of men’s tennis, while Rodman continues to shine for the Washington Spirit and the United States women’s national soccer team.The couple made their relationship official in 2025. Since then they have shared several happy moments together on social media. Their popularity, strong performances on the court and field, has surged their market value. As of early 2026, the duo’s combined estimated net worth stands between $8-$10 million or more. This comes in thanks to prize money, salaries, endorsement deals, and long-term sponsorship agreements.Ben Shelton’s individual net worth is estimated to be around $6 million to $8 million (per WorthyTrix). Most of his income comes from tennis prize money and sponsorships. According to ATP records, Shelton has already earned more than $6 million in career prize money. His endorsement portfolio is also growing quickly.He has major brands like Yonex, On, and Rolex supporting him.Shelton’s rise in tennis has been remarkable. Born in Atlanta, Georgia, he first played football before fully focusing on tennis under the guidance of his father, Bryan Shelton. Soon after, he turned professional and became one of the brightest young stars on the ATP Tour.Away from tennis, Shelton enjoys a comfortable lifestyle. He is known for his interest in cars. He reportedly owns vehicles like a Porsche 911 Carrera S and a Cadillac Escalade. He also maintains close ties with his family, including his sister Emma Shelton.Meanwhile, Trinity Rodman’s net worth in 2026 is estimated to be between $2 million and $2.6 million (per Parade). The daughter of former NBA star Dennis Rodman has become one of the biggest names in women’s soccer. Rodman plays as a forward and is considered one of the top talents in the sport.Rodman signed a record-setting contract extension with the Washington Spirit in 2022. Reports later revealed she agreed to another major deal worth more than $2 million per year including bonuses. Her endorsement partnerships with Adidas, Oakley, and Red Bull have also added to her earnings.She represented Team USA at the 2024 Paris Olympics and helped the national team win the gold medal in women’s soccer. At only 23 years old, Rodman’s earning potential continues to rise, making her one of the most marketable young athletes in the world alongside her boyfriend Ben Shelton.
Article Summary: Ben shelton and trinity rodman have become one of the most talked-about young sports couples in recent years. Both athletes are enjoying rapid success in their respective sports while building impressive fortunes at a young age. As of early 2026, the duo’s combined estimated net worth stands between $8-$10 million.

Article Title: Toronto Maple Leafs fire head coach Craig Berube in another major roster shake-up following their disappointing run
Article Text:
Toronto Maple Leafs Coach Craig Berube has fired head coach Craig Berube on Wednesday, marking another major shake-up for the franchise (Image via Getty Images)

Craig Berube dismissed as Toronto Maple Leafs head coach , search for new coach begins

Watch Maple Leafs Fire HC Craig Berube! | Instant Analysis Maple Leafs Fire HC Craig Berube! | Instant Analysis

In a shocking decision, the Toronto Maple Leafs have fired head coach Craig Berube on Wednesday, marking another major shake-up for the franchise after a disappointing 2025-26 season. The organization confirmed that no replacement has been named yet as the search for a new bench boss begins under recently appointed general manager John Chayka.Speculations floated around his name after Brad Treliving was fired from the team. It is to be noted that the 60-year-old went 84-62-18 in two seasons after taking over for Sheldon Keefe, who was fired May 9, 2024. Following the firing decision, Toronto Maple Leafs general manager John Chayka stated that players were not consulted leading up to it.The Maple Leafs (32-36-14) ended the season 0-6-1, finishing last in the Atlantic Division and 15th in the Eastern Conference, and missed the Stanley Cup Playoffs for the first time since 2016-17.In a major roster shake-up, the Toronto Maple Leafs dismissed their head coach , Craig Berube, on Wednesday, after he had spent two seasons behind Toronto’s bench and posted an 84-62-18 record during his tenure. He had been hired in 2024 to replace Sheldon Keefe, arriving with strong credentials after leading the St.Louis Blues to their first-ever Stanley Cup title in 2019.Following the decision, Maple Leafs General Manager John Chayka stated, "Craig is a tremendous coach and an even better person. This decision is more reflective of an organizational shift and an opportunity for a fresh start than it is an evaluation of Craig. We are grateful for his leadership, professionalism, and commitment to the Maple Leafs organization and wish Craig and his family nothing but the best moving forward. "According to the NHL, the Toronto Maple Leafs (32-36-14) ended the season 0-6-1, finishing last in the Atlantic Division and 15th in the Eastern Conference, and missed the Stanley Cup Playoffs for the first time since 2016-17. Last season, they won the Atlantic with 108 points (52-26-4).They defeated the Ottawa Senators in six games in the Eastern Conference First Round before losing to the eventual Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers in seven games in the second round. Toronto has advanced past the opening round of the playoffs twice since 2004 and has not won a Stanley Cup championship since 1967.As they are now busy hiring for another head coach, John Chayka was asked whether prior coaching experience in the National Hockey League would be an important requirement when hiring the next coach for the Toronto Maple Leafs.He added, “Experience in the NHL in larger markets could be an asset, and will be weighed, but I wouldn’t discount anything at this time. … I think regardless of who the coach is, we should have an organizational vision on how we play and the things we value, and then certainly through that process align on it.”Chayka also emphasized that regardless of who the coach is, the team should have an organizational vision on how we play and the things we value, and then certainly, through that process, align on it.Toronto now enters the offseason with the No. 1 overall pick in the upcoming draft and a new leadership group tasked with restoring the team to contention. Moreover, Berube's replacement will likely define the next phase of the Maple Leafs’ long-term rebuild.
Article Summary: The toronto maple leafs have fired head coach craig berube on wednesday. The 60-year-old went 84-62-18 in two seasons after taking over for sheldon keefe, who was fired may 9, 2024. The organization confirmed that no replacement has been named yet as the search for a new bench boss begins under recently appointed general manager john chayka.

Article Title: Updated IPL 2026 Points Table After RCB vs KKR match: RCB go top after Kohli masterclass; KKR playoff hopes fade
Article Text:
Virat Kohli celebrates after scoring his hundred in Raipur. (Pic credit: IPL)

Watch Krunal Pandya opens up on match-winning knock and RCB’s playoffs push Krunal Pandya opens up on match-winning knock and RCB’s playoffs push

IPL 2026 Points Table after RCB vs KKR match

Pos Team P W L NR Pts NRR 1 Royal Challengers Bengaluru 12 8 4 0 16 +1.053 2 Gujarat Titans 12 8 4 0 16 +0.551 3 Sunrisers Hyderabad 12 7 5 0 14 +0.331 4 Punjab Kings 11 6 4 1 13 +0.428 5 Chennai Super Kings 11 6 5 0 12 +0.185 6 Rajasthan Royals 11 6 5 0 12 +0.082 7 Delhi Capitals 12 5 7 0 10 -0.993 8 Kolkata Knight Riders 11 4 6 1 9 -0.198 9 Mumbai Indians (E) 11 3 8 0 6 -0.585 10 Lucknow Super Giants (E) 11 3 8 0 6 -0.907

NEW DELHI: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru reclaimed top spot in the IPL 2026 points table on Wednesday with a thumping six-wicket victory over Kolkata Knight Riders in Raipur.RCB talisman Virat Kohli played a match-winning unbeaten 105 off 60 balls to help the team chase down 193 in 19.1 overs for their eighth win of the season. They now top the standings in the business end of the IPL 2026 league stage with 16 points and an impressive net run rate (NRR) of +1.053, overtaking Gujarat Titans (16 points) on superior NRR.The defeat left KKR stranded in eighth spot, keeping their playoff hopes alive by the thinnest of margins. KKR’s four-match winning streak ended against RCB despite posting a competitive target.After RCB and GT, Sunrisers Hyderabad and Punjab Kings occupied the remaining two playoff spots with 14 and 13 points respectively.The rest of the standings remain unchanged after Match No. 57 of the 70-match league stage.Chennai Super Kings are fifth with 12 points, ahead of Rajasthan Royals on superior NRR, with both teams having three matches left each.Below them, Delhi Capitals and KKR are still mathematically alive in the playoff race. DC have 10 points from 12 games, while KKR have nine points from 11 games.Mumbai Indians and Lucknow Super Giants are the only two teams eliminated so far in the season.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru reclaim top spot in ipl 2026 points table. Defending champions beat kolkata knight riders by six wickets in raipur. Virat kohli scores unbeaten 105 to help rcb chase down 193 in 19.1 overs.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Vanessa Bryant move on with Luka Doncic six years after Kobe Bryant’s death?
Article Text:
Did Vanessa Bryant move on with Luka Doncic six years after Kobe Bryant’s death?(Image via Getty Images)

Are dating rumors about Vanessa Bryant and Luka Doncic true?



It has been over six years since the NBA legend Kobe Bryant passed away in a tragic helicopter crash alongside his teenage daughter, Gianna Bryant.Ever since then, Kobe Bryant’s wife, Vanessa Bryant’s personal life has dominated the headlines even as she tries to remain distant from it.No, the rumors are false and the story has been completely fabricated by a fake account on X.For the unversed, a few days ago, a post about the Los Angeles Lakers’ star player Luka Doncic and Vanessa Bryant’s romance had sparked chaos.The post had convinced many that Kobe Bryant’s wife Vanessa Bryant had finally moved on in her life, six years after Kobe Bryant’s death.However, it is entirely false as both Vanessa Bryant and the star player, Luka Doncic remain distant from the rumors.Shockingly, this was not the first time that the popular philanthropist, Vanessa Bryant, was dragged into such fake dating rumors.Over the last few years, many such intrusive rumors about her personal life has sparked shockwaves and gotten her brutally trolled.But Vanessa Bryant has always been quick to shut them down with a clarification.While Vanessa Bryant has remained silent about her fake dating rumors with Luka Doncic, the Los Angeles Lakers’ star player is dealing with his own set of problems.For the unversed, Luka Doncic has been busy fighting a messy custody battle with his ex fiancee, Anamaria Goltes, over their two daughters, Gabriela and Olivia.While their engagement initially had millions of fans rooting for their future together, Luka Doncic and his ex fiancee, model Anamaria Goktes, split a few months ago.Ever since then, the Los Angeles Lakers’ star player has been engaged in a messy custody battle with her.A few hours ago, Luka Doncic announced that he will not be playing for the Slovenia national team in the summer as he seeks to spend more time with his children.Luka Doncic wrote, “I love my daughters more than anything, and they will always come first in my life…As I continue working toward joint custody of my daughters, I have been forced to make a difficult decision between traveling and playing for the Slovenian national team and being with my daughters this summer.”
Article Summary: Vanessa bryant and luka doncic dating rumors are false. The story has been completely fabricated by a fake account on x. It has been over six years since the nba legend kobe bryant passed away in a helicopter crash alongside his teenage daughter, gianna bryant.

Article Title: Cardi B: Stefon Diggs is desperate to make things work again with Cardi B, per insider
Article Text:
Cardi B and Stefon Diggs (Getty Images)

Stefon Diggs is reportedly doing more to make his relationship with Cardi B work



But why did they break up in the first place?



There was also a whole court case in the middle of all this



And just to recap how we even got here

Am I The Drama?

Sources are confirming that Stefon Diggs is actively trying to win back Cardi B after the two split earlier this year, and it looks like it might actually be working. According to People, Diggs recently "stepped it up" in a big way and showed Cardi he is serious. An insider confirmed "he wants to make it work" and that Cardi "never closed the door completely" on the relationship. She still cares about him a lot, and the internet is losing its mind over it.At his Diggs Deep Foundation Mother's Day wellness event this week, Diggs kissed Cardi on the cheek, dipped her, held onto her hips, and the two were visibly all over each other even after the cameras stopped rolling. Cardi also reportedly gifted Diggs' mother an expensive Chanel bag for Mother's Day. If that is not a green flag, we do not know what is.Cardi pulled away in February 2026, right around the Super Bowl, after fans noticed the two had unfollowed each other on Instagram . Sources later confirmed the split was real. "She didn't trust him and felt like things were going on behind her back," an insider revealed. She needed to finish her Little Miss Drama Tour and keep things stable for her kids. So she stepped back and focused on herself.Because of course there was. Diggs was facing a serious assault case involving his former private chef throughout the entire relationship drama. This week, a jury found him not guilty after brief deliberations. He was visibly emotional after the verdict and then went straight to the gym. Very Stefon Diggs of him.Cardi and Diggs first went public at a New York Knicks playoff game in May 2025. Cardi was spotted on the Jumbotron squeezing his cheeks, and the internet was done for. They went Instagram official the following month. Then, during the rollout for her albumCardi announced she was pregnant. On November 13, 2025, they welcomed a baby boy, whom fans immediately dubbed Baby Touchdown.One baby, one breakup, one court case, and one very loaded Mother's Day event later, Stefon Diggs is doing the work to get his girl back. We are watching every single update.
Article Summary: Stefon diggs is reportedly doing more to make his relationship with cardi b work. An insider confirmed "he wants to make it work" and that cardi "never closed the door completely" the two split earlier this year after fans noticed they unfollowed each other on instagram.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Virat Kohli scripts history with unbeaten ton, becomes fastest ever to...
Article Text:
Virat Kohli (Image: ANI)

Watch Krunal Pandya opens up on match-winning knock and RCB’s playoffs push Krunal Pandya opens up on match-winning knock and RCB’s playoffs push

Fewest innings to 14,000 T20 runs:

409 — Virat Kohli

423 — Chris Gayle

431 — David Warner

468 — Jos Buttler

505 — Alex Hales

633 — Kieron Pollard

Most T20 runs by Indians:

14,000 — Virat Kohli

12,491 — Rohit Sharma

9,797 — Shikhar Dhawan

9,654 — Suryakumar Yadav

8,830 — Sanju Samson

8,654 — Suresh Raina

8,602 — KL Rahul

Most IPL hundreds:

9 — Virat Kohli

7 — Jos Buttler

6 — Chris Gayle

6 — KL Rahul

5 — Sanju Samson

Most 50+ scores vs KKR in IPL:

9 — Virat Kohli

8 — Rohit Sharma

8 — David Warner

8 — Suresh Raina

7 — Shikhar Dhawan

Virat Kohli added yet another golden chapter to his legendary T20 career on Wednesday, becoming the fastest batter in history to complete 14,000 runs in the format during Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s victory over Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2026.The RCB superstar reached the landmark in just 409 innings, comfortably breaking the previous record held by Chris Gayle, who had taken 423 innings to get there. Kohli’s latest achievement once again underlined his incredible longevity and consistency in the shortest format of the game.Kohli also strengthened his position as India’s highest run-scorer in T20 cricket history.The historic night became even more special as Kohli smashed his ninth IPL century to guide Royal Challengers Bengaluru to a crucial six-wicket win over Kolkata Knight Riders.Coming into the game after back-to-back ducks, Kohli responded in champion fashion with an unbeaten 105 off 60 balls, hammering 11 fours and three sixes in a masterclass chase under pressure.The knock also took him to the top of another elite IPL list.Kohli also extended his dominance against Kolkata Knight Riders, registering his ninth 50-plus score against the franchise, the most by any batter in IPL history.Chasing 193 in Raipur, RCB were under pressure after recent batting struggles, especially with Kohli enduring a lean patch that included two consecutive ducks. But the former captain once again delivered when his side needed him most.He stitched together a crucial 92-run partnership with Devdutt Padikkal, who contributed 37 off 27 balls, before calmly finishing the chase in 19.1 overs.The victory lifted Royal Challengers Bengaluru to the top of the IPL 2026 points table with 16 points, level with Gujarat Titans but ahead on net run rate.Earlier, Kolkata Knight Riders had posted 192 for four after Angkrish Raghuvanshi played a brilliant knock of 71 off 46 deliveries. The young batter struck seven fours and three sixes while adding important partnerships with Cameron Green (32) and Rinku Singh, who remained unbeaten on 49.However, the night ultimately belonged to Virat Kohli, who silenced critics after consecutive failures and once again proved why he remains one of the greatest T20 batters the game has ever seen.Also Stay Updated With IPL Points Table
Article Summary: Virat kohli becomes the fastest batter in history to complete 14,000 runs in the format during royal challengers bengaluru’s victory over kolkata knight riders in ipl 2026. Rcb superstar reached the landmark in just 409 innings, comfortably breaking the previous record held by chris gayle, who had taken 423 innings to get there.

Article Title: Rain threat looms large over PBKS' IPL 2026 playoffs chances! What happens if match is washed out vs MI
Article Text:
Rain threat looms over PBKS' IPL 2026 Playoff chances (Image: IPL/BCCI)

Watch Delhi Capitals' Madhav Tiwari reflects on his brilliant all-round performance Delhi Capitals' Madhav Tiwari reflects on his brilliant all-round performance

What it means for Punjab Kings (PBKS)



What it means for Mumbai Indians (MI)



Punjab Kings face Mumbai Indians in a must-win clash to strengthen their playoff hopes, but a looming rain threat in Dharamshala during match time could impact Punjab Kings’ chances.The Dharamshala weather forecast indicates a high 55% to 60% chance of rain and thunderstorms for tonight's match, making a rain interruption or a complete washout highly possible. The Indian Meteorological Department has issued a 'Yellow Alert' for the Kangra Valley, as heavy downpours and overcast skies have already disrupted pre-match practice sessions at the HPCA Stadium.Punjab Kings currently sit in 4th place with 13 points and a Net Run Rate (NRR) of +0.428 from 11 matches. They are closely pursued by Chennai Super Kings (+0.185 NRR) and Rajasthan Royals (+0.082 NRR), who both have 12 points.If the IPL 2026 clash in Dharamsala is washed out due to rain, both teams will receive one point each, resulting in a “No Result.” However, with Mumbai Indians already mathematically eliminated from the playoff race, the shared points would have very different consequences for the two sides.A washout would take PBKS to 14 points, helping them maintain a slight cushion over chasing teams like Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals, who are both currently on 12 points.However, the bigger concern for Punjab would be the impact on their top-two hopes.A no-result would cap their maximum possible points tally at 18 if they go on to win their remaining two matches against Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Lucknow Super Giants. That would significantly reduce their chances of overtaking table-toppers RCB and Gujarat Titans, both of whom already sit on 16 points. It would also mark Punjab’s second abandoned game of the season, making them the only team in the current top four relying on split points rather than outright victories.For Mumbai Indians, who are already out of playoff contention, a washout would mainly deny them the opportunity to play spoiler against a direct rival in the playoff race. The single point would, however, move MI slightly ahead of Lucknow Super Giants in the lower half of the table, marginally helping their effort to avoid finishing at the bottom of the standings.
Article Summary: Rain threat looms over punjab kings' ipl 2026 playoff chances. Dharamshala weather forecast indicates a high 55% to 60% chance of rain and thunderstorms for tonight's match, making a rain interruption or a complete washout highly possible. Indian meteorological department has issued a 'yellow alert' for the kangra valley.

Article Title: NHL Trade Rumors: Edmonton Oilers linked to 6-foot-5 Sabres defenseman Michael Kesselring in potential defensive overhaul
Article Text:
NHL Trade Rumors: Oilers urged to pursue Michael Kesselring (Getty Images)

Why is Michael Kesselring emerging as a trade target for Edmonton Oilers?

The Edmonton Oilers are heading into a summer of uncertainty after a first-round playoff exit against the Anaheim Ducks. The loss has already shifted focus to roster changes, with the right side of the blue line emerging as a clear area of concern. Pending unrestricted free agent Connor Murphy adds another layer of uncertainty. Amid that backdrop, veteran writer Jim Matheson has suggested a familiar name in Buffalo Sabres defenseman Michael Kesselring as a possible trade target for Edmonton this offseason.The idea of a reunion between the Oilers and Michael Kesselring has gained traction because of familiarity and need. Edmonton still lacks stability on the right side of its defense, and internal options have not fully solved the issue. Kesselring, once drafted by the Oilers in the 2018 NHL Entry Draft at 146th overall, was moved before he could debut. After time with the Arizona Coyotes, now Utah Mammoth, and a recent stop with the Buffalo Sabres, his path has kept him on Edmonton’s radar.In a recent column, Jim Matheson highlighted the fit and situation in Buffalo Sabres. He wrote: “The Oilers should be trying to bring back right-shot defenceman Mike Kesselring, the former Edmonton farmhand who was blocked in their depth chart and sent to Arizona for centre Nick Bjugstad in 2023.The 6-foot-5 Kesselring, 26, traded to the Sabres last June along with Josh Doan for JJ Peterka, isn’t playing for Buffalo in the playoffs,” Matheson wrote. “Word is Kesselring isn’t happy sitting.”From a performance standpoint, Michael Kesselring’s numbers this season with Buffalo Sabres have been modest, but his track record suggests upside. He produced two assists in 34 games this year, yet showed far more offensive rhythm earlier. With the Utah Mammoth, he posted seven goals and 22 assists for 29 points, and in 2023-24 with the Arizona Coyotes he added five goals and 21 points across 65 games. At 26, he remains a physical right-shot option who could compete for a bottom-pairing role in Edmonton, with room to push higher if his game stabilises again.Even if a reunion does not materialise, the Oilers’ offseason direction on defense feels set. The right side remains a priority, especially with uncertainty around Connor Murphy’s future. Other names around the league, including Rasmus Ristolainen, Colton Parayko, Braden Schneider, Zach Whitecloud, Darren Raddysh, Jacob Trouba, John Carlson and Radko Gudas, have surfaced in trade or free-agent discussions. For Edmonton, the challenge is not just adding experience, but finding the right balance of size, mobility and reliability.
Article Summary: Edmonton oilers heading into a summer of uncertainty after a first-round playoff exit against the anaheim ducks. The right side of the blue line is emerging as a clear area of concern. Veteran writer jim matheson has suggested a familiar name in buffalo sabres defenseman michael kesselring as a possible trade target for edmonton.

Article Title: Jason Collins net worth in 2026: NBA career, husband, and personal life as ex-NBA star passes away
Article Text:
Jason Collins. Image via: Chris Pizzello/Invision/ AP

Jason Collins net worth before his passing



Jason Collins' NBA career and earnings



Who is Jason Collins’ husband?



Jason Collins' legacy



Jason Collins' life after NBA retirement



Jason Collins built a career that was never defined by flashy numbers, yet his influence on basketball reached far beyond the stat sheet. Following news of Collins’ death at 47 after a battle with Stage 4 glioblastoma, attention has shifted not only to his historic NBA legacy but also to the life he built away from the court. From his groundbreaking role as the first openly gay active player in major American team sports to his work as an advocate and ambassador, Collins remained a respected figure long after retirement.The former NBA center spent 13 seasons in the league, earned millions during his playing career, and became one of the most important cultural voices in modern sports history. Even during his final months, Collins continued speaking openly about his health battle and the importance of authenticity. His death prompted tributes from across the basketball world, with many remembering not just the barrier he broke, but the calm and thoughtful way he carried himself through it all.At the time of his death in May 2026, Jason Collins reportedly had an estimated net worth of around $14 million (per Celebrity Net Worth). Much of that wealth came from a long NBA career that stretched across more than a decade, along with advocacy work and ambassador roles after retirement.Collins revealed in late 2025 that he had been diagnosed with Stage 4 glioblastoma, describing it as “one of the deadliest forms of brain cancer.” His family later confirmed he died following a “valiant fight” with the disease.“Jason changed lives in unexpected ways and was an inspiration to all who knew him and to those who admired him from afar,” his family said in a statement shared by the NBA.Drafted 18th overall in 2001 by the Houston Rockets before being traded to the New Jersey Nets, Collins carved out a reputation as one of the league’s most dependable role players. He later suited up for the Memphis Grizzlies, Minnesota Timberwolves, Atlanta Hawks, Boston Celtics, Washington Wizards, and eventually the Brooklyn Nets.Collins earned respect for his defense. Over 13 NBA seasons, he reportedly earned more than $34 million in salary.His biggest moment came off the floor in 2013, when he publicly came out in a groundbreaking Sports Illustrated essay.“I'm a 34-year-old NBA center. I'm black. And I'm gay,” Collins wrote. “I didn't set out to be the first openly gay athlete playing in a major American team sport. But since I am, I'm happy to start the conversation.”Collins was married to Brunson Green, an Oscar-nominated Hollywood producer known for films including The Help. The couple married in May 2025 after several years together.Green and Collins first connected after the former NBA player retired in 2014. Collins once recalled asking friends about Green after their first meeting, saying, “Brunson left for Europe the following day, and while he was overseas, I asked everyone I knew in LA, ‘Have you heard of this guy?’”The couple did not have children together, though Collins remained especially close with his twin brother, Jarron Collins, and his parents throughout his life.Collins’ place in sports history was secured long before his death. In 2014, he became the first openly gay athlete to play in any of North America’s four major professional sports leagues.NBA commissioner Adam Silver later said Collins “helped make the NBA, WNBA and larger sports community more inclusive and welcoming for future generations.”After retiring in 2014, Collins stayed connected to basketball and advocacy work. He served as a global NBA ambassador, participated in equality campaigns, and remained active in community programs focused on inclusion and representation.In one of his final interviews, Collins reflected on a call he once received from former President Barack Obama after publicly coming out.
Article Summary: Former nba center jason collins died at 47 after a battle with stage 4 glioblastoma. Collins was the first openly gay active player in major american team sports. He earned millions during his 13-year playing career and continued to be an advocate and ambassador after retirement.

Article Title: Steve Sarkisian ignites fierce SEC backlash after cruel Ole Miss student comments during Texas football interview
Article Text:
Steve Sarkisian ignites fierce SEC backlash after cruel Ole Miss student comments during Texas football interview (Image via Getty)



Steve Sarkisian comments on Ole Miss draw response from Keith Carter and Jon Sumrall

College football is still months away from returning, but the talking has already started in the SEC. This time, the attention is not about players, rankings, or championships. Instead, it is about comments made by Texas head coach Steve Sarkisian that quickly upset people connected to the University of Mississippi. Speaking to USA Today while discussing transfer rules and academic standards, Steve Sarkisian explained how credits work for players transferring into Texas. He said the university only accepts 50 percent of a player’s academic credit hours. Then he took a direct shot at Ole Miss.“At Texas, we will only take 50% of a player’s academic credit hours,” Steve Sarkisian told USA Today. “You may be a semester from graduating, but you’re going all the way back to 50% if you play here and want a degree. But at Ole Miss, they can take you. All you have to do is take basket weaving, and you can get an Ole Miss degree.”The comment quickly spread across social media and led to backlash from people connected to Ole Miss. Many fans, alumni, and staff members felt the Texas coach crossed the line by mocking the school’s academics. Mississippi athletic director Keith Carter responded on X by writing, “Kind of amazing how uncomfortable our success is making some people.”The criticism did not stop there. Jon Sumrall, who spent one season coaching at Ole Miss as an assistant, also defended the school online. He posted, “Grateful to coach at a top 10 public university that also offers advanced basket weaving!”The timing of Steve Sarkisian’s remarks also made headlines because SEC spring meetings are scheduled for May 26 to May 28 in Miramar Beach, Florida. Coaches and school officials from across the conference will meet there, meaning the comments could become a bigger talking point around the league.The debate also comes shortly after former Ole Miss coach Lane Kiffin spoke about recruiting and diversity in the South during an interview with Vanity Fair. Lane Kiffin explained that some families from outside Mississippi were uncomfortable with the idea of their children moving to Oxford.“Hey, Coach, we really like you, but my grandparents aren’t letting me move to Oxford, Mississippi,” Lane Kiffin said families would tell him.He later clarified that he was not trying to attack Ole Miss. Speaking to On3, Lane Kiffin said, “I was asked questions about the differences in recruiting, and I said a narrative that we battled there from some out-of-state Black parents and grandparents was not wanting their kid to move to Mississippi. That’s a narrative that coaches have been fighting forever.”Ole Miss has long faced criticism connected to its racial history. The school was the site of violent protests in 1962 when James Meredith became the first Black student admitted to the university after a Supreme Court order. The school’s “Rebels” nickname and the term “Ole Miss” have also remained part of larger discussions around the university’s past.
Article Summary: Texas head coach steve sarkisian made the comments while discussing transfer rules and academic standards. He said the university only accepts 50 percent of a player’s academic credit hours. Then he took a direct shot at ole miss, saying, “all you have to do is take basket weaving, and you can get an ole miss degree”

Article Title: Latest NHL trade update links Toronto Maple Leafs star Matthew Knies with $46.5 million blockbuster speculation with Chicago Blackhawks, Montreal Canadiens and Utah Mammoth
Article Text:
Matthew Knies #23 of the Toronto Maple Leafs skates with the puck against the Dallas Stars during the first period at the Scotiabank Arena on April 13, 2026 in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. (Photo by Mark Blinch/NHLI via Getty Images)

Toronto Maple Leafs' Matthew Knies trade rumors intensify across NHL offseason market



Major NHL trade rumors are swirling around the Toronto Maple Leafs again, as multiple teams have reportedly asked about the availability of Matthew Knies. The Chicago Blackhawks, Montreal Canadiens and Utah Mammoth have all shown interest, and that’s been amplified by Toronto’s underwhelming 2025-26 season and growing chatter about a potential roster retool under new management.Matthews Knies is still one of the organization’s most valuable young forwards despite trade chatter around the NHL offseason market. The 23-year-old winger is entering the second year of a six-year, $46.5 million deal, making him a tantalizing long-term asset for teams looking for size, scoring and physicality in their top-six forward group.The name Matthew Knies has become a hot topic in the NHL after insiders reported that several franchises had reached out to the Toronto Maple Leafs about a potential trade. Toronto is not actively shopping the American winger, but rival executives believe the organization could listen if a massive return package is offered, TSN Hockey Insider Pierre LeBrun said.The former second-round pick had 23 goals, 43 assists, 66 points in 79 games this season. His combination of physicality, offense and age makes him one of the more intriguing young power forwards on the NHL trade rumor mill.The Chicago Blackhawks are believed to be aggressive in their search for more young offensive talent.Adding a player like Matthew Knies to Chicago’s already impressive rebuild with Connor Bedard at the helm could immediately bolster the team’s top-six group. The long-term upside of Knies and his manageable salary cap hit have reportedly also piqued the interest of the Montreal Canadiens and Utah Mammoth.Now Toronto’s front office is trying to walk a tightrope. The Maple Leafs are looking to stay competitive, but also to add some defensive depth and flexibility to their overall roster.Still, league sources continue to believe a trade remains unlikely unless another organization blows Toronto away with a significant offer.
Article Summary: The chicago blackhawks, montreal canadiens and utah mammoth have all shown interest in matthew knies. The 23-year-old winger is entering the second year of a six-year, $46.5 million deal. The former second-round pick had 23 goals, 43 assists, 66 points in 79 games this season.
